offer.name: Strategy Bootcamp — 6-week intensive
offer.promise: Build a senior-level consulting strategy practice in 6 weeks. Real client work, weekly group review, framework library included.
offer.audience: Mid-career consultants (5-10 years experience) wanting to upgrade from execution to strategy advisory
proof_points: 92 alumni since 2024, average client billing rate up 40% post-bootcamp
Cohorts capped at 12 for true peer learning
objections: I already have an MBA / consulting experience
Will I actually get strategy work after?

goal.notes: Cohort opens in 21 days, target = 12 paid signups

input.brief: Launch promotion for the next cohort. Angle: most consultants stay stuck at execution because nobody taught them strategic framing. The bootcamp is run by a senior who left consulting after burnout to teach what schools don't.

notes: Tests Critic on EN-language with explicit price + decision stage. business_potential should weight heavily.
